powers.label: My Assigned Stories
powers.prompt: Query Jira for all stories assigned to me in the current sprint. Show: key, summary, status, story points, and acceptance criteria count.

powers.label: Analyze Story...
powers.prompt: Which story should I analyze? I'll check for: missing acceptance criteria, unclear scope, missing dependencies, and testability gaps.

powers.label: Generate AC...
powers.prompt: Which story needs acceptance criteria? Provide the ticket key and I'll generate Given/When/Then acceptance criteria based on the description and context.

powers.label: Story Gaps Check
powers.prompt: Review all stories in the current sprint. Flag any that are missing: acceptance criteria, story points, description, or have vague scope.

powers.label: Sprint Scope Summary
powers.prompt: Summarize the current sprint scope: total stories, story points committed, epics represented, and key deliverables.

powers.label: Scope Creep Check
powers.prompt: Compare the current sprint contents against what was committed at sprint start. Identify any items added mid-sprint and their impact on capacity.

powers.label: Dependency Map
powers.prompt: Analyze stories in the current sprint for dependencies: cross-team, technical, and external. Flag any blocked or at-risk items.

powers.label: Epic Coverage Analysis
powers.prompt: For each epic in my project, analyze: total stories vs completed, missing scenarios, and gaps between epic description and story coverage.

powers.label: Generate PRD...
powers.prompt: Which epic or feature should I generate a PRD for? I'll create a Product Requirements Document with problem statement, user stories, acceptance criteria, and success metrics.

powers.label: Spec vs Implementation
powers.prompt: Compare the requirements/spec for a feature against what's been implemented. Identify gaps, deviations, and untested scenarios.

powers.label: Standup Summary
powers.prompt: Generate my daily standup update based on my Jira activity: what I worked on yesterday, what I'm doing today, and any blockers or decisions needed.

powers.label: Sprint Review Prep
powers.prompt: Prepare sprint review talking points: completed stories with business value, demos to show, metrics, and items that didn't make it (with reasons).

powers.label: Release Notes Draft
powers.prompt: Generate user-facing release notes from completed stories in the current sprint. Group by feature area, use non-technical language.
